statement: In every magma, Equation 4082 (`x * x = ((y * x) * x) * z`) implies Equation 4108 (`x * x = ((y * z) * z) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0324
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, (op x x) = (op (op (op y x) x) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x x) = (op (op (op y z) z) x)
